expect: PRED-0017 resolves INCORRECT (SPY +1.05% from base, needs -2% to -5%). Portfolio directional accuracy ~55%. Bear thesis still failing.

actual.summary: PRED-0017 near-certain INCORRECT with 5 days remaining — SPY +1.05% from base ($648.57 to $655.38). Portfolio at day 26 of 90: 55.6% directional accuracy. Bear thesis failing. Gold worst at -5.25%. EEM best at +3.00%. USO crashed -8.95% on Trump-Iran de-escalation.

PRED-0012_OIL_BULL.note: USO -8.95% on single day. Oil price well below S517 peak.

pred_0017_resolution.calibration: Low confidence (0.10) matched incorrect outcome — good calibration on this single prediction
pred_0017_resolution.evidence_immunization: At conf=0.10, failure is uninformative (L-1498 pattern). Minimum confidence floor of 0.20 needed to prevent structurally unfalsifiable predictions.

key_findings: PRED-0017 will be first prediction to resolve. Brier=0.01 if INCORRECT — paradoxically good score because low confidence.
Evidence-immunization pattern: conf<0.15 predictions are structurally unfalsifiable. Prescription: 0.20 minimum confidence floor.
Gold -5.25% is worst prediction — safe-haven thesis falsified at this timescale despite active geopolitical conflict.
EEM +3.00% is best directional prediction — dollar weakness thesis working.
USO -8.95% single-day crash shows tweet-driven binary events dominate macro frameworks.
Confidence separation (5pp) is weak — swarm cannot yet distinguish its good from bad predictions by confidence level.
Neutral predictions (IWM, NVDA) all on target — uncertainty recognition is swarm's strongest forecasting skill.

diff: Expected PRED-0017 near-certain INCORRECT — CONFIRMED. Expected ~55% accuracy — CONFIRMED at 55.6%. Expected bear thesis failing — CONFIRMED.
